data.title: Skeena Resources Raises US$750 Million in Notes to Refinance Eskay Creek and Buy Back Gold Stream
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Skeena Resources ( (TSE:SKE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 10, 2026, Skeena Resources completed a US$750 million offering of 8.5% senior secured notes maturing in 2031, marking what it says is the first public high-yield notes deal by a pre-revenue miner in more than a decade. The company plans to use the proceeds to repurchase two-thirds of a US$200 million gold stream tied to its Eskay Creek project, pre-fund 18 months of interest, and finance remaining construction and corporate needs.

The refinancing replaces an undrawn US$350 million senior secured loan and US$100 million cost overrun facility arranged in 2024 with a covenant-light debt structure that Skeena says lowers its overall cost of capital and boosts financial flexibility. By buying back 66.67% of the gold stream early for US$184 million, Skeena increases its exposure to future gold prices and production from Eskay Creek, aiming to improve long-term operating margins, simplify its capital structure, and enhance project economics for shareholders as the mine advances toward planned start-up in 2027.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:SKE) stock is a Sell with a C$41.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Skeena Resources stock, see the TSE:SKE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SKE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SKE is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance (pre-revenue profile, ongoing losses, and sustained cash burn with higher 2025 free-cash-flow pressure). Technicals add further downside bias (below key short-term averages with negative MACD), while valuation is also penalized by negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on SKE stock, click here.

More about Skeena Resources

Skeena Resources Limited, branded as Skeena Gold & Silver, is a precious metals development company focused on advancing the fully permitted Eskay Creek gold-silver project in British Columbia’s Golden Triangle. The project is under construction and is expected to become one of the world’s highest-grade, lowest-cost open-pit precious metals mines, with significant silver by-product output and a target of initial production and cash flow in the second quarter of 2027.

Average Trading Volume: 489,317

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$5.48B

The latest update is out from Super X AI Technology ( (SUPX) ).

On April 10, 2026, SuperX AI Technology announced it had completed the first batch delivery of high-performance AI servers from its Japan Global Supply Center to Digital Dynamic Inc. on March 24, 2026, marking a key milestone in its strategic partnership with DDI and eole Inc. in Japan. The shipment comprised SuperX XI6150 servers tailored for the Japanese market, bundled with installation, testing, asset documentation and a three-year maintenance program combining remote and on-site support.

SuperX said subsequent batches of the same AI server model are scheduled for delivery and installation from late April through the end of August 2026, underlining the scale of its engagement in Japan’s AI data center build-out. The company’s Japan Global Supply Center has been configured with annual capacity of up to 20,000 AI servers and is backed by a local service team and spare-parts network, advancing SuperX’s global expansion strategy and reinforcing its position in Japan’s fast-growing AI infrastructure ecosystem.

More about Super X AI Technology

SuperX AI Technology Limited is a Singapore-headquartered provider of AI infrastructure solutions for data centers, offering proprietary hardware, advanced software and end-to-end services to institutional clients worldwide. Its core products include high-performance AI servers, 800VDC power solutions, high-density liquid cooling systems, as well as AI cloud and AI agents for enterprises, research institutions and cloud and edge computing deployments.

On April 10, 2026, United States Antimony Corporation released an operational update on its Fostung Project in Ontario, disclosing that a Technical Report Summary effective January 31, 2026, had been completed by SRK Consulting (Canada), Inc. in line with U.S. securities regulations. The report covers 50 contiguous mining claims over 1,109 hectares and confirms the project’s status as a skarn-type tungsten deposit with additional molybdenum, copper, and silver, reinforcing the strategic importance of the Fostung asset within the company’s critical minerals portfolio and signaling continued technical de-risking of this intermediate-stage exploration project.

The Fostung Project, located near Espanola in the Sudbury District and owned through subsidiary UAMY Cobalt, is positioned within a well-known mining jurisdiction that could support future development prospects. By formalizing and filing a compliant technical report, the company enhances transparency for investors, provides a clearer basis for assessing the project’s potential, and underscores its focus on advancing tungsten and associated critical metals within its broader resource strategy.

data.title: Upland Software Faces Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Deficiency
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Upland Software ( (UPLD) ) has issued an announcement.

On April 7, 2026, Upland Software received a notice from Nasdaq that its common stock had closed below the $1.00 minimum bid price requirement for 30 consecutive business days, triggering a deficiency status under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5450(a)(1). The notice does not immediately affect the trading of Upland’s shares on the Nasdaq Global Market, where the stock continues to trade under the ticker UPLD.

Upland has until October 5, 2026, to regain compliance by maintaining a closing bid price of at least $1.00 for 10 consecutive business days, with the possibility of an additional 180-day grace period if it transfers to the Nasdaq Capital Market and meets certain other listing standards. Failure to regain compliance could ultimately result in delisting, a process the company could appeal, and Upland said it will monitor its share price and consider options to cure the deficiency, underscoring ongoing pressure on its market valuation and potential risk for shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (UPLD) stock is a Hold with a $0.66 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Upland Software stock, see the UPLD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on UPLD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, UPLD is a Neutral.

The score is held down mainly by deteriorating/recently declining revenue and a leveraged balance sheet, alongside clearly bearish technicals. Offsetting factors include consistently positive free cash flow, guidance for continued margin expansion, and a relatively low P/E.

To see Spark’s full report on UPLD stock, click here.

More about Upland Software

Upland Software, Inc. is a provider of cloud-based enterprise work management software, offering tools that help businesses manage projects, documents, customer engagement, and related workflows. The company targets corporate and institutional customers seeking to streamline operations and improve productivity through scalable, subscription-based software solutions.

On April 10, 2026, BiomX Inc. closed the acquisition of Israeli AI defense technology firm ZorroNet from Water IO, issuing 1.3 million shares and a $1.25 million non-convertible note due July 7, 2026 as consideration. The deal also includes a performance-based earnout tied to ZorroNet’s 2026 revenue or EBITDA and commitments to retain key personnel for three years on comparable terms.

ZorroNet develops AI-powered command-and-control and autonomous surveillance software that fuses video analytics, drones, sensors and IoT devices into a unified operational intelligence layer for real-time threat detection and response. Its systems are already deployed with the Israel Defense Forces, Israel Railways, Elbit Systems and other defense and critical infrastructure customers, providing BiomX with production-grade, revenue-generating capabilities.

BiomX said the acquisition is immediately accretive and marks its formal entry into the defense, security and rescue sectors, positioning the company as an AI-powered defense technology platform with an established customer base. The move complements its option to acquire Israeli LADAR specialist DFSL and targets fast-growing global command-and-control and video analytics markets, where rising demand for integrated situational awareness and AI-enabled decision support is reshaping security operations.

data.title: MetaVia Advances DA-1726 Obesity Trial With First Patient
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from MetaVia ( (MTVA) ) is now available.

On April 10, 2026, MetaVia Inc. announced it had dosed the first patient in Part 3 of its Phase 1 clinical trial of DA-1726, a dual oxyntomodulin analog targeting GLP-1 and glucagon receptors for the treatment of obesity. The new 16-week study segment in obese but otherwise healthy adults will test one-step titration to 48 mg and two-step titration to 64 mg to refine dosing strategies and safety at higher exposure levels.

The Part 3 trial will enroll 40 participants split into two cohorts, assessing safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics, and pharmacodynamics, alongside metabolic and body composition measures such as weight, waist circumference, BMI, and cardiometabolic markers. MetaVia highlighted earlier Phase 1 data showing around 9% weight loss at 48 mg with favorable tolerability and metabolic benefits, positioning DA-1726 as a potentially differentiated obesity therapy that may reach effective doses more quickly than existing GLP-1-based treatments.

The most recent analyst rating on (MTVA) stock is a Buy with a $8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on MetaVia stock, see the MTVA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MTVA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MTVA is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses and cash burn, and equity erosion) and bearish technicals (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Positive corporate updates around DA-1726 and obesity/MASH positioning provide some support, but valuation remains constrained by ongoing unprofitability.

To see Spark’s full report on MTVA stock, click here.

More about MetaVia

MetaVia Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on transforming cardiometabolic diseases, developing novel therapies for obesity and Metabolic Dysfunction-Associated Steatohepatitis (MASH). Its lead candidate DA-1726 is a once-weekly subcutaneous dual agonist of GLP-1 and glucagon receptors, while vanoglipel (DA-1241) targets GPR119 to modulate gut peptide release and improve liver and metabolic parameters.

DA-1726 has shown best-in-class potential in a Phase 1 multiple ascending dose obesity trial, demonstrating weight loss, improved glucose control, and reductions in waist circumference, and pre-clinical data suggest superior or comparable weight loss and lipid effects versus leading GLP-1-based therapies. Vanoglipel has demonstrated direct hepatic action and favorable effects on liver inflammation, steatosis, fibrosis, and glucose metabolism in pre-clinical and early clinical studies.

Average Trading Volume: 258,811

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $6.06M

On April 7, 2026, Roadzen Inc. told investors at the Maxim Group “Powering the AI Revolution” Virtual Conference that it is operating at an annualized revenue run rate of about $60 million and is targeting roughly $100 million within six to twelve months, and that it expects to reach adjusted EBITDA breakeven in the current quarter. Management highlighted the firm’s decade-long investment in proprietary data and its more than 300 task-specific AI models, claiming measurable gains for clients including a 72% cut in accident rates via its DrivebuddyAI platform and a roughly 10-point combined-ratio improvement versus the U.S. auto insurance average.

Roadzen underscored its role as a founding member of the AI Alliance and emphasized that its competitive edge lies in deploying high-accuracy AI in real-money insurance decisions, supported by approximately 4 billion driving miles and 100 million historical claims in its datasets. The company also stressed the strategic importance of being the only provider certified under India’s AIS-184 standard for in-vehicle AI safety systems, positioning it to benefit from India’s deferred 2027 mandate for AI-based safety technology in new commercial vehicles, which it estimates could translate over time into a potential incremental annual revenue opportunity of about $200 million, subject to regulatory enforcement, OEM adoption, and execution.

Trio Petroleum Corp. ( (TPET) ) has provided an announcement.

Trio Petroleum Corp. has been actively expanding its at-the-market equity program first disclosed on January 9, 2026, when it entered into an At Market Issuance Sales Agreement with Ladenburg Thalmann & Co. Inc. and filed a related prospectus supplement for up to $3.6 million in common stock under an existing Form S-3 registration. Between March 3 and April 10, 2026, the company filed nine successive amendments to this prospectus supplement, steadily increasing the maximum aggregate offering size from $6.892 million to $24.208 million while selling approximately $22.93 million of stock, leaving $1.282 million of shares available for sale as of the latest amendment, a move that significantly enlarges Trio’s equity-raising capacity and adds to potential shareholder dilution.

These amendments, made under the constraints of General Instruction I.B.6 of Form S-3, reflect a stepwise approach to maximizing the use of Trio’s shelf registration and at-the-market facility as market conditions and prior sales allowed. The pattern of frequent adjustments and the substantial volume of shares already sold indicate that Trio is leaning heavily on this program as a core funding mechanism, with implications for its capital structure and existing investors’ ownership stakes, as the company continues to tap the market for additional equity capital.

More about Trio Petroleum Corp.

Trio Petroleum Corp. is a Delaware-incorporated company that issues and trades common stock as its primary security. The company accesses public capital markets through registered offerings of its $0.0001 par value common shares, utilizing at-the-market equity programs to raise funds over time, reflecting a financing strategy focused on incremental share issuance under an effective shelf registration.

Oatly Group ( (OTLY) ) has provided an update.

On April 10, 2026, Oatly Group AB announced it had issued the formal notice convening its annual general meeting, scheduled for May 20, 2026, in Malmö, with shareholders able to vote in person, by proxy or via postal voting. The company will also webcast the meeting for information purposes, and shareholders must be registered by May 11 and confirm attendance or submit postal votes by May 13.

Key AGM agenda items include approving the 2025 financial statements, deciding on profit allocation, and granting discharge from liability to board members and the CEO, with the board proposing no dividend for 2025 and that the result be carried forward. Shareholders will also vote on board composition and leadership through 2029, new long-term incentive and board equity programs running 2026–2028, a series of warrant issuances, and amendments to the articles of association, decisions that will shape Oatly’s governance, capital structure and executive incentives in the coming years.

data.title: Beneficient Expands AI Fund Exposure Through Preferred Stock
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Beneficient ( (BENF) ).

On April 8, 2026, Beneficient completed a primary capital transaction in which its customized trust vehicles acquired a limited partner interest in Quartus AI Fund LP, an $8.75 million net asset value fund managed by New York-based Quartus Capital Partners that invests in growth-stage vertical AI and technology ventures. In exchange, the fund received 875,214 shares of Beneficient’s newly designated Series B-10 resettable convertible preferred stock, which is convertible into Class A common shares under a variable pricing formula with conversion caps and ownership limits, and ranks junior to the company’s Series A preferred and pari passu with other Series B series on dividends and liquidation.

Following the deal, announced publicly on April 10, 2026, Beneficient recorded an unrealized gain of about $1.2 million tied to appreciation in the fund’s existing portfolio and expects roughly $9.77 million of additional alternative asset collateral for its ExAlt loan portfolio, along with a similar increase in tangible book value attributable to public stockholders on a pro forma basis. The transaction extends Beneficient’s GP Primary Commitment Program into a top-quartile AI-focused fund that has attracted institutional and family office investors, reinforcing the company’s strategy of using structured preferred equity to deploy capital into alternative assets while seeking to enhance shareholder value and strengthen collateral backing its lending activities.

The most recent analyst rating on (BENF) stock is a Hold with a $3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Beneficient stock, see the BENF Stock Forecast page.

More about Beneficient

Beneficient, listed on Nasdaq as BENF and known as Ben, operates a technology-enabled platform that provides exit opportunities, primary capital solutions, and related trust and custody services to holders of alternative assets. The company targets traditionally underserved investors, including mid- to high-net-worth individuals, smaller institutions and general partners seeking liquidity, anchor commitments and preferred financing for their funds, and conducts its fiduciary operations under Kansas’ TEFFI framework through a regulated subsidiary.

Beneficient’s GP Primary Commitment Program focuses on supplying primary capital and anchor commitments to private investment funds during fundraising, immediately deploying capital into the company’s equity and aiming to tap what it sees as a large unmet demand for primary commitments in the alternative assets market.
